title: Sourcemeta One API Error
description: The error response format returned by the Sourcemeta One API endpoints

examples.title: Not Found
examples.detail: There is nothing at this URL

const.title: Not Found
const.detail: There is nothing at this URL

const.title: Unauthorized
const.detail: This resource requires authentication

const.title: Forbidden
const.detail: This feature is only available in the Enterprise edition

const.title: Method Not Allowed
const.detail: This HTTP method is invalid for this URL

const.title: Method Not Allowed
const.detail: This schema was not precompiled for schema evaluation

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The schema URI must not contain a fragment

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: You must provide a query parameter to search for

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The search query must contain at least one non-whitespace character

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The search query must not exceed 256 characters

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The limit must be a positive integer between 1 and 100

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The scope must be a comma-separated list of: path, title, description

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: You must pass an instance to validate against

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The request body is not valid JSON

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The request body does not match the expected schema

const.title: Not Acceptable
const.detail: The server cannot satisfy the request content encoding

const.title: Content Too Large
const.detail: The request body is too large

const.title: Expectation Failed
const.detail: The Expect header carries an unsupported expectation

const.title: Internal Server Error
const.detail: This action requires a schema path match

const.title: Not Implemented
const.detail: This version does not implement such action handler for this URL

const.title: Internal Server Error
const.detail: This action requires a policy name match

const.title: Internal Server Error
const.detail: The authentication configuration is incomplete

const.title: Bad Gateway
const.detail: The identity provider could not be reached

const.title: Bad Gateway
const.detail: The authorization code could not be redeemed

const.title: Bad Gateway
const.detail: The identity token could not be validated

const.title: Forbidden
const.detail: The identity provider declined the login

const.title: Bad Request
const.detail: The login could not be completed

detail.const: The instance does not conform to the schema

errors.description: The standard JSON Schema output errors describing why the instance does not conform

detail.description: The message describing why the JSON-LD annotations cannot be resolved

facet.description: The JSON-LD annotation facet that the resolution error is about

instanceLocation.description: The instance location where the resolution stopped

detail.description: The message describing why the context cannot be processed
The raw Blaze exception message describing the schema-evaluation failure
